untranslatable_reason: Signal requires EPS rank and quarterly earnings growth metrics which are not available in the allowed indicator set. These are fundamental/earnings-based metrics (eps_rank, quarterly_growth_rate, five_year_avg_growth) not present in the technical indicator library. Additionally, the deceleration detection logic (growth rate declining QoQ) cannot be accurately modeled without access to quarterly earnings data and historical comparisons.
translation_notes: The signal is fundamentally dependent on EPS rank scores and earnings growth rates, which are earnings/fundamental metrics outside the scope of technical indicators. While close price was used as a proxy for the entry condition, it does not accurately represent the intended EPS rank >= 75 filter. The quarterly deceleration detection and earnings momentum analysis cannot be properly translated without access to earnings data.
